name: Shah Peerally Bankruptcy Lawyer Credit Counseling & Repair Debt Help & Reduction
description_short: Immigration law firm specializing in visa petitions, green cards, and employment-based immigration. Does not offer bankruptcy, credit counseling, debt help, or credit repair services.
description_long:
Shah Peerally Law Group PC is a full-service immigration law firm headquartered in Newark and San Francisco, California, with offices formerly located in Fremont. The firm is led by attorney Shah Peerally, Esq., an American Immigration Lawyers Association (AILA) member with significant professional recognition and industry credentials. The company's website and extensive content archive demonstrate a focused practice exclusively in immigration law matters. The firm has received numerous accolades including an Avvo rating of 10/10 (superb), recognition as a rising star by Superlawyers.com, and selection as one of Northern California's Top Immigration Lawyers by San Francisco Magazine in multiple years (2014, 2015). Shah Peerally was also recognized as one of the Young Outstanding Lawyers of Northern California in 2013.

The firm's actual services are entirely centered on immigration law. Their practice areas include family-based immigration, employment-based visas (H1B, L1, E2, EB1, EB2, EB4), student visas, temporary protected status (TPS), adjustment of status, citizenship and naturalization, asylum and refugee benefits, U visas, VAWA petitions, and related immigration matters. They provide legal advice to individuals, families, employers, and investors seeking to navigate U.S. immigration law. The firm has been featured as legal experts on major international television networks including NDTV and Times Now.

The website content is entirely focused on immigration law practice areas with no mention of bankruptcy, credit counseling, debt management, credit repair, or consumer finance services. The firm name appearing in the CreditDoc database appears to be a significant data quality issue, as the actual company website contains zero content related to bankruptcy law or credit/debt services.

This company is completely miscategorized. Consumers searching for bankruptcy lawyers, credit counseling, or debt reduction services on CreditDoc will find an immigration law firm instead. The mismatch between the database listing and actual business operations represents a fundamental categorization error that requires correction.
pros: AILA member attorney with 10/10 Avvo rating (highest available rating)
Recognized as rising star by Superlawyers.com and Top Immigration Lawyer by San Francisco Magazine
Multi-office presence with locations in Newark, San Francisco, and formerly Fremont
Extensive expertise across diverse immigration visa categories (employment, family, student, humanitarian)
Featured legal expert on major international television networks (NDTV, Times Now)
Published in San Jose Mercury News and Immigration Law Weekly (ILW.com)
Multiple attorney endorsements from other legal professionals citing knowledge and responsiveness
cons: Currently experiencing technical phone difficulties; requires contact through paralegal backup number
Website navigation and content organization appears to prioritize archive/category listings over clear service descriptions
Significant data quality issue: listed on CreditDoc as bankruptcy/credit counseling firm when firm exclusively practices immigration law
No information provided regarding fee structures, retainer requirements, or cost transparency
Practice is geographically limited to Bay Area (California) and Washington DC regions
best_for: Individuals and families seeking employment-based visa sponsorship (H1B, L1, EB visas)
Foreign nationals applying for green cards, citizenship, or adjustment of status
Employers and investors needing immigration legal counsel for hiring and visa petitions
diagnosis: This company is completely miscategorized on CreditDoc. Shah Peerally Law Group is an immigration law firm with no services related to bankruptcy, credit counseling, debt reduction, or credit repair. Consumers looking for debt help or bankruptcy assistance will reach an immigration attorney. This listing requires immediate correction or removal from the bankruptcy/credit counseling category.
services: Employment-based visa petitions (H1B, H2B, H4, L1, E2, E3)
EB-category green card sponsorship (EB1, EB2, EB4)
Family-based immigration and green card applications
Adjustment of status and consular processing
Legal advice for individuals, families, employers, and investors
